overview.title: What is StandardizedPayload?
overview.description: StandardizedPayload is the required output format for all Asset Template conversion scripts. It ensures that all data flowing through MapexOS follows a consistent, predictable structure, enabling seamless integration across the platform.
benefits: Ensures consistency across all data sources

eventType.name: eventType
eventType.description: Categorizes the type of event being processed. Use a hierarchical naming convention with dots for clarity.

eventId.name: eventId
eventId.description: Unique identifier for this specific event. Should be globally unique to enable event tracking and deduplication.

data.name: data
data.description: The actual payload data. Must be a non-empty object containing the sensor readings, device information, or any other relevant data.

metadata.name: metadata
metadata.description: Additional contextual information about the event. Use this for system-level data, processing information, or any metadata that doesn't belong in the main data object.

created.name: created
created.description: Timestamp when the event was created or when the data was generated. Must be in ISO 8601 format.

example.title: Complete Example
example.description: Example conversion script that transforms raw sensor data into StandardizedPayload format:

items.label: Missing required fields
items.caption: Ensure all required fields (eventType, eventId, data, created) are present

items.label: Empty data object
items.caption: The data field must contain at least one property

items.label: Invalid timestamp format
items.caption: Use ISO 8601 format: new Date().toISOString() or "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z"

items.label: Wrong data type
items.caption: data and metadata must be objects (not arrays or primitives)

items.label: Not returning the payload
items.caption: Remember to return the standardPayload object at the end of your conversion script

footer.info: All conversion scripts must return a StandardizedPayload object
